groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #2.

sentences.text: Battle scars and dents across the front plate of the tank told the story of many engagements.
Battle scars and dents across the front plate of the tank told the story of many engagements. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines.

Battle scars and dents across the front plate of the tank told the story of many engagements. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines. The commander ordered the tank to advance across the muddy terrain toward the enemy position. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen.

Battle scars and dents across the front plate of the tank told the story of many engagements. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines. The commander ordered the tank to advance across the muddy terrain toward the enemy position. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. The reconnaissance drone transmitted live footage of the enemy tank position to the brigade command post.

The commander ordered the tank to advance across the muddy terrain toward the enemy position. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. The reconnaissance drone transmitted live footage of the enemy tank position to the brigade command post. The hydraulic turret drive enables the tank to slew its main gun three hundred sixty degrees in under nine seconds.

The automatic feeder dispensed a pinch of flake food into the tank at precisely eight each morning. The aquarist introduced live coral fragments into the reef tank during the scheduled maintenance session. The eel slithered through a narrow PVC pipe wedged between rocks at the bottom of the tank. I spent way too much money on new plants for the tank but they look so good. Two hermit crabs crawled slowly across the sandy floor of the saltwater tank near the window. CO2 injection at two bubbles per second promotes vigorous plant growth in a high-tech planted tank. We got this awesome little shrimp colony going in the tank and they keep multiplying like crazy. My daughter named every single fish in the tank and gets upset if we mix them up.
